name: OISD Big
description: Comprehensive blocking of ads, trackers, and malware, tuned to avoid breaking sites. The recommended all-in-one list.

name: OISD NSFW
description: Blocks adult and pornographic sites. Ideal for family devices.

name: Hagezi Pro
description: Aggressive all-in-one list covering ads, trackers, malware, and phishing. Maximum coverage.

name: StevenBlack Unified
description: The classic unified hosts file consolidating trusted ad and malware sources.

name: Phishing Army
description: Blocks phishing and fraud websites. Layer on top of an ads/trackers list.

name: No Google
description: Blocks Google's tracking and services across its domains. Aggressive — expect Google sign-in, Search, and other Google sites to break.

name: No Facebook & Instagram
description: Blocks Meta's Facebook, Instagram, and their tracking domains.

name: No TikTok
description: Blocks TikTok and its tracking domains.

name: Gambling
description: Blocks online gambling and betting sites.

name: Cryptomining
description: Blocks cryptocurrency miners and mining pools.
